name: Macaroni Art
recipeInstructions:
1. Place food coloring and alcohol in a plastic container with lid. Add macaroni until the tub is 1/2 full. Cover and shake.
2. Spread on aluminum foil to dry.
3. To make an easy stringing tool to make macaroni beads, dip one end of yarn or string in glue, about 2 inches of it and let dry overnight.
